title: Ubiquiti Enterprise 3.5" HDD, 16 TB
category: Cameras, security / IP NVR Recorders / UniFi Video
description: Enterprise-grade 3.5" SATA hard drive ideal for storage-intensive UniFi camera security and NAS systems. Workload rating: 550 TB/year. Mean time between failure (MTBF): 2.5 million hours. Verified and optimized for UniFi device compatibility.
